description: Provision PostgreSQL for local development and wire up the schema registry service — models, migrations, routers, config, and Copier template updates. Part of design doc 007 (App + Local workstream).

userStories.title: Create shared SQLAlchemy base library
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a shared SQLAlchemy base package in monorepo/libs/ so that all services use consistent model conventions (naming, timestamps) without duplicating boilerplate.
acceptanceCriteria: DeclarativeBase class with snake_case naming conventions for tables and indexes
Timestamp mixin with created_at (server_default) and updated_at (onupdate)
Common column types and type annotations defined
Bazel BUILD file exposes the library as a dependency
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Effort: S. Foundational — must be done before models in US-002.

userStories.title: Define schema registry SQLAlchemy models
userStories.description: As a developer, I want SQLAlchemy ORM models for the schema registry (Subject, SchemaVersion, SchemaReference) so that the service can persist schema data to PostgreSQL.
acceptanceCriteria: Subject model with name (unique), compatibility_mode (enum), description, created_at, updated_at
SchemaVersion model with subject_id FK, version, schema_type (enum), definition (JSONB), fingerprint, checksum, created_at
SchemaReference model with schema_version_id FK, referenced_schema_version_id FK, reference_name
Appropriate indexes: subject name lookup, subject+version unique, fingerprint for dedup
Compatibility mode enum with check constraint
icontract invariants: schema_type valid enum, definition parseable for declared schema_type, version positive integer
Polyfactory factories and Hypothesis strategies for model invariant tests
Uses shared SQLAlchemy base from US-001
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Effort: M. Depends on US-001 (shared base).

userStories.title: Install CloudNativePG operator in local dev (Tiltfile)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CloudNativePG running in my local k3d environment so that I can develop and test database-backed services locally with full parity to dev/production.
acceptanceCriteria: CNPG operator Helm chart deployed via Tiltfile
Cluster CRD created: single instance, local-path storage, no WAL archiving
initdb creates per-service databases (schema_registry, etc.)
Credentials match app-secrets.ts local defaults
Postgres port exposed for local tooling (psql, pgAdmin)
Tilt resource dependencies ensure Cluster is healthy before services start
tdp-db-credentials secret values match Cluster config
userStories.notes: Effort: M. Independent — can run in parallel with US-002 but ordered after for Ralph sequential execution.

userStories.title: Create initial Alembic migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an autogenerated Alembic migration from the SQLAlchemy models so that the database schema can be provisioned and version-controlled.
acceptanceCriteria: Alembic revision autogenerated from models in TDP-007-03
Migration applies cleanly against a fresh database
alembic downgrade reverses cleanly
Migration drift test: autogenerate against current models asserts no changes produced
pg_advisory_lock wrapper in run_migrations_online for safe concurrent execution
Migration added to CI test pipeline
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement migration execution strategy
userStories.description: As a developer, I want migrations to run automatically — via entrypoint locally and via K8s Job in dev/production — so that database schema is always up to date before the application starts.
acceptanceCriteria: Local: entrypoint.sh runs alembic upgrade head before starting the application
Dev/Production: Kubernetes Job as Helm pre-upgrade hook runs alembic upgrade head
Job uses pg_advisory_lock wrapper from US-004
Deployment does NOT run migrations on entrypoint in dev/production
Helm chart includes migration-job.yaml template gated on migrations.enabled value
Backward compatibility rule and rollback procedure documented in service README
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Effort: M. Depends on US-004 (migration with advisory lock).

userStories.title: Wire database session into schema registry routers
userStories.description: As a developer, I want schema registry API endpoints to use real database queries instead of hardcoded stubs so that the service can persist and retrieve schema data.
acceptanceCriteria: get_db_session dependency injected into route handlers
list_schemas implemented as SELECT query
get_schema implemented as SELECT WHERE query
create_schema endpoint added (POST /schemas)
Tests updated to use test database fixture from conftest.py
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Configure DATABASE_URL injection via K8s secrets
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the schema registry to construct DATABASE_URL from individual K8s secret fields so that credentials are managed securely per environment.
acceptanceCriteria: Helm chart adds env vars: DB_HOST, DB_PORT, DB_NAME, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD, DB_SSLMODE from secretKeyRef
config.py adds optional individual env var fields with Pydantic validator assembling database_url
database_url kept as assembled output field for backward compatibility
Dev/production: DB_SSLMODE=verify-full with CNPG CA certificate mounted
Local: DB_SSLMODE=disable or omitted
Health endpoint includes DB ping check
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Effort: S. Depends on US-003 (local CNPG for testing).

userStories.title: Update Copier template database defaults
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Copier template's use_database=true option to generate a working database configuration so that new services get correct DB setup out of the box.
acceptanceCriteria: config.py.jinja adds individual DB_* env var fields with validator assembling database_url
database_url kept as output field (not renamed — avoid breaking copier update)
conftest.py.jinja reads test DATABASE_URL from env var with localhost fallback
migration-job.yaml template added to Helm chart gated on migrations.enabled
entrypoint.sh.jinja includes migration step gated on run_migrations_on_start
Generated README includes note about local Postgres via Tiltfile
copier update validated on schema-registry with conflicts resolved
Typecheck passes
